title: Maximum Small Parcel Postal Mailing Boxes, Brown Corrugated Cardboard Box, Size 45cm x 35cm x 16cm, for Shipping and Storage (3)
features: Durable Construction: Made from a strong 2mm thick single-wall cardboard for reliable protection during shipping.
Maximum Small Parcel Size: External dimensions of 45cm x 35cm x 16cm (17.75" x 13.75" x 6.25") and internal dimensions of 44.5cm x 34.5cm x 15.5cm
Lightweight: Each box weighs only 275g, making them easy to handle and cost-effective for shipping.
Versatile Use: Ideal for shipping a variety of items, from gifts to merchandise, suitable for both personal and business use.
Eco-Friendly: Made from recyclable materials, these boxes are an environmentally responsible choice for your shipping needs.
description: MEG4TEC Maximum Size Small Parcel Strong Cardboard Shipping Boxes Color: Natural Brown Inside and Out Dimensions: External: 45cm x 35cm x 16cm (17.75" x 13.75" x 6.25"), Internal: 44.5cm x 34.5cm x 15.5cm Weight: 275g per box Ensure your items are shipped securely with our Maximum Size Small Parcel Strong Cardboard Shipping Boxes. These high-quality boxes are designed for durability and strength, providing excellent protection for your goods. The natural brown finish offers a neat and professional appearance, both inside and out. Perfect for a variety of shipping needs, from gifts to merchandise, these boxes are lightweight yet sturdy, making them ideal for personal or business use. Trust our cardboard boxes to keep your items safe during transit.
